use_cases: Hero section headlines with a Matrix-style character scramble reveal effect
Tech and developer-tool branding with cybersecurity-inspired aesthetics
Landing page text animations for software products and SaaS platforms
Dramatic intro text reveals in web applications
Creative typography elements for gaming or sci-fi themed sites
ai_summary: A Matrix-inspired text animation component that creates a digital rain effect by scrambling characters through random '1' and '0' values before revealing the final text. Runs a timed sequential animation on mount with configurable delays and durations. Designed for tech-forward branding, developer tools, and cybersecurity-themed applications where a cinematic text reveal adds dramatic impact to hero sections or landing pages.
